overall_cve.delta_vs_prior_run: April MTD moved 4772 (day 23 snapshot) → 4971 (day 24 snapshot): +199 CVEs net over 24h. Extrapolation moved 5965 → 6214 (+4.2%). April now projecting marginally below March (6304) rather than meaningfully below. Week-17 (Apr 20-26) partial count: 1088 → 1287. Weeks 14-16 stable. Interpretation: The upward drift this week could reflect either (a) late NVD arrival of early-April Glasswing disclosures, or (b) ordinary batch backfill. Counter-argument: even if April lands ~6200, that's not a break from the Q1-2026 pattern (5143 / 4808 / 6304) and doesn't by itself evidence a Glasswing-driven volume shock.

confirmed_glasswing: CVE-2026-4747 (FreeBSD NFS RCE — autonomous Anthropic/Carlini find)
glasswing_cves.notes: No new explicit Claude/Mythos CVE credits surfaced in today's Google News sweep. SecurityWeek, CSO Online, Register, and Bloo coverage continues to reaffirm the 271-Firefox / 6-credited split. CSA Labs and ZeroFox both published follow-on commentary but did not surface new CVEs. Counter-argument: absence of new public attributions doesn't mean none occurred — Anthropic continues Mythos Preview access to the 13 participants, who disclose on their own cadence without necessarily flagging Mythos assistance.

exploit_intelligence.watch_list_status_summary: No new public-exploit escalations detected for the 14 watch-list CVEs since the 2026-04-22T03:10Z full scan. Previously-known states: 2 weaponized (CVE-2026-33825 Defender, CVE-2026-39987 Marimo — both now KEV-confirmed), several 'poc' (Thymeleaf cluster CVE-2026-40477/40478; Cisco ISE cluster disclosed with researcher PoCs), remainder 'none'. This run did not re-run full ExploitDB/Metasploit/GitHub-PoC sweeps; targeted Google News check for watch-list CVEs returned no new PoC publications.
exploit_intelligence.full_rescan_deferred_reason: Previous full scan ran ~36h ago (2026-04-22T03:10Z). Refresh cadence for exploit-intelligence scans is every 48-72h unless an escalation signal appears. Next scheduled full sweep: next refresh run (2026-04-25).

google_news_hits.note: Independent scrutiny of 271 vs 3-CVE gap. Supports the existing 'headline number overstates severity' framing.

google_news_hits.headline: Project Glasswing: Anthropic AI Uncovers Thousands of Unpatched Vulnerabilities in AWS, Apple, and Cisco
google_news_hits.note: Restates the participant model; no new specific attributions.

vendor_advisory_flags.notes: Cisco ISE RCE cluster already tracked (CVE-2026-20180/20186/20147). No new CVEs this run — advisory page confirms existing cluster.

New advisory surfaced in search results; HTTP/SIP-parsing adjacent RCE in Cisco UCM. Third-party researcher credit not yet parsed. Candidate for analyst review — fits self-scan profile if internally credited.
SNMP DoS/RCE — network management plane, not HTTP-parsing. Outside thesis scope but noted for completeness.
ISE XML External Entity information disclosure — XXE is HTTP-parsing adjacent and matches the 'automated-scan bug pattern' profile. Candidate for analyst review.

Active exploitation disclosure from 2026-04-23 — persistence mechanism surviving Sept 2025 patch. Joint Cisco + NCSC + CISA emergency directive. Not a Glasswing self-scan (exploitation-driven), but significant KEV/emergency context for the next run.

mythos_monitoring.counter_argument: Cisco advisory candidates are suggestive but not conclusive — Cisco has a large PSIRT pipeline and routinely finds internal bugs without AI assistance. The self-scan pattern is diagnostic, not probative.

np_di_candidates.rationale: Advisory URL surfaced; needs analyst to pull CVE IDs and CVSS. HTTP/SIP-parsing RCE matches NP+DI profile.
XXE in ISE admin console HTTP parser — textbook NP+DI (CWE-611 is on the DI list). Cisco is a Glasswing participant. Analyst should pull the CVE ID and add to server watch list.
CISA Emergency Directive ED 25-03 published with NCSC/Cisco 2026-04-23. Exploitation-driven event, not a Glasswing self-scan candidate. Will likely appear in KEV imminently.

projection_comparison.note: Extrapolated April ~6214 ≈ March 6304 ≈ conservative line (no Mythos-driven step function visible yet). Aggressive scenario (+2-5k/mo) not supported by April data.
